themes.title: User Tracking and Compliance
themes.description: Focus on building the foundational user tracking capabilities while ensuring compliance with regulations.

themes.title: Recommendation and Insights
themes.description: Develop advanced recommendation systems and user insights through dashboards.

themes.title: Transparency and User Control
themes.description: Enhance user transparency and control over their data and preferences.

milestones.name: MVP Development
milestones.description: Establish the user behavior tracking pipeline and ensure GDPR compliance.
milestones.success_criteria: User behavior tracking pipeline is operational, GDPR compliance is verified, and consent mechanisms are implemented.

milestones.name: V1 Development
milestones.description: Implement the recommendation engine and user dashboards while ensuring data export capabilities.
milestones.success_criteria: Recommendation engine is live, user preference dashboard is functional, and data export for advertisers is established.

milestones.name: V2 Development
milestones.description: Enhance user transparency and feedback mechanisms.
milestones.success_criteria: Transparency dashboard is live and user feedback collection is operational.

sequencing.reason: V1 development requires the foundational user behavior tracking pipeline and GDPR compliance established in MVP.
V2 development builds on the insights and capabilities established in V1.

mvp.goal: Establish core user tracking and compliance features.

v1.goal: Develop advanced recommendation systems and user insights.

v2.goal: Enhance transparency and user control over data.
